pageTitle: COVERED — Free Period Products, Paid for by Advertising
metaDescription: COVERED puts smart dispensers full of free, plastic-free period products in the places people actually need them — funded entirely by advertising. We got you covered.
ogDescription: Smart dispensers. Free period products. Funded by brands, not users. We got you covered.
footerTagline: Free period products, paid for by advertising. We got you covered.
ctaBannerText: Advertise with purpose, host a dispenser, or just say hello — we'd love to hear from you.
